method: Normal CDF centered on most recent Truflation US CPI YoY (~1.83%, last 5 series samples 1.798-1.827). Sigma=0.10pp reflects daily move size in active period (Apr 1 1.26% -> Apr 13 1.84%, gasoline-driven), step std ~0.04 per ~weekly sample.
notes: Underlying is Truflation US CPI YoY % (rules text: 'Truflation US CPI YoY for Apr 29, 2026 above X%'). Latest available value extracted from time-series embedded in Truflation marketplace HTML (last 30 ~weekly points end at 1.83). News-confirmed datapoint: Apr 13 = 1.84% (Truflation blog). Current trend is mildly upward driven by gasoline. Sigma 0.10 captures typical daily move in current regime. Market quotes are nearly flat at 0.48-0.50 from 1.81 to 2.06 (clearly low-liquidity/wide-spread mid quotes) — my model's monotone estimate diverges substantially in the 1.91-2.06 region. Confidence MEDIUM (current value reasonable but daily granularity unclear).
